scopes.name: Watchlist
scopes.description: Manage the user's watchlist groups (read/create/update/delete) and look up the securities each group contains.

scopes.name: Account & Positions
scopes.description: Query account assets and cash flow — fund/stock holdings, account cash and equity, margin ratio, profit analysis and statements — for portfolio overviews, position display and account reconciliation.

scopes.name: Trade Order Lookup
scopes.description: Cover the post-submit order lifecycle and execution data: order detail, today/history orders, today/history executions, DCA plan reads, plus pre-trade max purchase quantity estimation.

scopes.name: Trade Execution
scopes.description: Place, replace and cancel orders, plus DCA plan create/update/pause/resume/stop.
